steps.title: Apply the probability formula
steps.content:
The probability that a randomly selected subscriber is an MTN subscriber equals the ratio of MTN subscribers to total subscribers.

We're told this probability is 0.43, there are $p$ million MTN subscribers, and 97 million total subscribers on September 30, 2015.
Setting up the equation:
$$\frac{p}{97} = 0.43$$

steps.title: Solve for p and round
steps.content:
Multiply both sides by 97:
$$p = 0.43 \times 97$$
Calculating: $p = 41.71$
Rounding to the nearest integer, $p = 42$ million.
